faqs.question: How do I connect Zoho Desk?
faqs.answer: Use API credentials or OAuth authentication to securely connect Zoho Desk to Gapflow. Follow our setup guide for detailed instructions.

faqs.question: Can I automate complex workflows?
faqs.answer: Yes! Build sophisticated workflows with conditional logic, loops, error handling, and multi-step processes.

faqs.question: What about data security?
faqs.answer: All data is encrypted in transit and at rest. Connections use secure authentication and you control access permissions.

faqs.question: How do I handle errors?
faqs.answer: Built-in error handling with retries, fallbacks, and notifications. Monitor workflow health and get alerted to issues.

faqs.question: Can I sync large datasets?
faqs.answer: Yes! Bulk operations and batch processing handle large volumes efficiently. Schedule syncs during off-peak hours.

faqs.question: What about rate limits?
faqs.answer: Gapflow automatically handles API rate limits with intelligent throttling and queuing to ensure reliable operation.

limits.title: API Rate Limits
limits.description: API rate limits vary by plan and endpoint. Gapflow automatically handles throttling and retries for reliable operation.

limits.title: Data Volume
limits.description: Large datasets may require batch processing. Use pagination and incremental syncs for optimal performance.

limits.title: Sync Frequency
limits.description: Real-time syncs available via webhooks. Scheduled syncs can run as frequently as needed based on your requirements.

limits.title: Field Mapping
limits.description: Complex field mappings supported with transformations. Custom logic available for specialized data processing needs.
